mathlib_matches.name: Field
mathlib_matches.notes: Class in Mathlib; fields, field extensions, characteristic, prime fields all extensively covered

mathlib_matches.name: CommRing
mathlib_matches.notes: Class in Mathlib; commutative rings with identity, ring homomorphisms fully covered

mathlib_matches.name: IsDomain
mathlib_matches.notes: Class in Mathlib combining NoZeroDivisors and Nontrivial

mathlib_matches.name: Ideal
mathlib_matches.notes: Mathlib.RingTheory.Ideal; prime ideals (Ideal.IsPrime), maximal ideals (Ideal.IsMaximal), principal ideals (Submodule.IsPrincipal), quotient rings (Ideal.Quotient) all fully covered

mathlib_matches.name: Int
mathlib_matches.notes: The integer ring Z is extensively developed in Mathlib with EuclideanDomain, CommRing, IsDomain instances

mathlib_matches.name: Rat
mathlib_matches.notes: The rationals Q with Field instance; IsFractionRing Int Rat available

mathlib_matches.name: Real
mathlib_matches.notes: Mathlib.Topology.Instances.Real and related; R, R_{>=0} (NNReal), R_{>0} all available with full ordering

mathlib_matches.name: Nat.Prime
mathlib_matches.notes: Prime numbers, divisibility, coprimality (Nat.Coprime, Int.gcd) fully covered

mathlib_matches.name: Nat.instUniqueFactorizationMonoid
mathlib_matches.notes: Nat is a UniqueFactorizationMonoid; unique factorization fully formalized

mathlib_matches.name: ZMod
mathlib_matches.notes: Z/pZ as ZMod p with Field instance when p is prime

mathlib_matches.name: GaloisField
mathlib_matches.notes: Finite fields F_q in Mathlib.FieldTheory.Finite.GaloisField

mathlib_matches.name: Polynomial
mathlib_matches.notes: Mathlib.Algebra.Polynomial; polynomial rings, monic polynomials (Polynomial.Monic), irreducible polynomials, minimal polynomials (minpoly) all fully covered

mathlib_matches.name: FractionRing
mathlib_matches.notes: Mathlib.RingTheory.Localization.FractionRing; fraction field of an integral domain with IsFractionRing typeclass

mathlib_matches.name: IsPrincipalIdealRing
mathlib_matches.notes: Class in Mathlib.RingTheory.PrincipalIdealDomain; every ideal is principal

mathlib_matches.name: UniqueFactorizationMonoid
mathlib_matches.notes: Class in Mathlib.RingTheory.UniqueFactorizationDomain; unique factorization into irreducibles

mathlib_matches.name: IsNoetherianRing
mathlib_matches.notes: Class in Mathlib; equivalent to ACC on ideals and every ideal being finitely generated

mathlib_matches.name: krullDim
mathlib_matches.notes: Defined in Mathlib.Order.KrullDimension as supremum of lengths of chains

mathlib_matches.name: ringKrullDim
mathlib_matches.notes: Ring-specific Krull dimension via PrimeSpectrum; available in Mathlib.RingTheory.KrullDimension

mathlib_matches.name: Localization
mathlib_matches.notes: Mathlib.RingTheory.Localization; localization at a multiplicative set, with Localization.AtPrime for localization at prime ideals

mathlib_matches.name: MonoidHom
mathlib_matches.notes: Group/monoid homomorphisms fully covered in Mathlib

mathlib_matches.name: PowerSeries
mathlib_matches.notes: Mathlib.RingTheory.PowerSeries; formal power series ring k[[t]]

mathlib_matches.name: LaurentSeries
mathlib_matches.notes: Defined via HahnSeries in Mathlib.RingTheory.LaurentSeries; Laurent series field k((t))

mathlib_matches.name: AlgebraicClosure
mathlib_matches.notes: Mathlib.FieldTheory.IsAlgClosed.AlgebraicClosure; existence of algebraic closure, field embeddings

mathlib_matches.name: IsAlgClosed
mathlib_matches.notes: Typeclass for algebraically closed fields

mathlib_matches.name: FiniteDimensional
mathlib_matches.notes: Finite-dimensional algebras/modules; used for finite field extensions

mathlib_matches.name: IntermediateField
mathlib_matches.notes: Mathlib.FieldTheory.IntermediateField; intermediate fields in extensions

mathlib_matches.name: Module.finrank
mathlib_matches.notes: Degree of extension as finrank

mathlib_matches.name: MvPolynomial.IsSymmetric
mathlib_matches.notes: Symmetric polynomials exist in Mathlib.RingTheory.MvPolynomial.Symmetric; fundamental theorem of symmetric polynomials is available. The specific fact about coefficients as symmetric functions of roots may need assembly

mathlib_matches.name: Polynomial.roots
mathlib_matches.notes: Multiset of roots; Vieta's formulas connecting roots to coefficients

mathlib_matches.name: Module.Free
mathlib_matches.notes: Free modules over Z; Z-lattices available in Mathlib

mathlib_matches.name: ZLattice
mathlib_matches.notes: Z-lattices in number field contexts in Mathlib.NumberTheory

mathlib_matches.name: IsRegularLocalRing
mathlib_matches.notes: Regular local rings are defined in Mathlib but the theory is not as fully developed as other ring-theoretic concepts

mathlib_matches.name: Module
mathlib_matches.notes: Vector spaces are modules over fields in Mathlib; dimension theory fully covered via Module.finrank

mathlib_matches.name: AbsoluteValue.add_le
mathlib_matches.notes: Built into the AbsoluteValue structure as an axiom

mathlib_matches.name: num_dvd_of_is_root
mathlib_matches.notes: In Mathlib.RingTheory.Polynomial.RationalRoot; if x/y is a root, then y divides the leading coefficient and x divides the constant term

mathlib_matches.name: den_dvd_of_is_root
mathlib_matches.notes: Companion to num_dvd_of_is_root

mathlib_matches.name: isInteger_of_is_root_of_monic
mathlib_matches.notes: Integral root theorem: roots of monic polynomials over UFDs are integers

mathlib_matches.name: Int.euclideanDomain
mathlib_matches.notes: In Mathlib.Algebra.EuclideanDomain.Int; Z is a Euclidean domain, hence a PID (EuclideanDomain implies IsPrincipalIdealRing)

mathlib_matches.name: Polynomial.instIsPrincipalIdealRing
mathlib_matches.notes: Polynomial rings over fields are Euclidean domains hence PIDs; this applies to F_q[t] since F_q is a field. The instance chain Field -> EuclideanDomain -> IsPrincipalIdealRing covers this

mathlib_matches.name: CharP
mathlib_matches.notes: Characteristic theory in Mathlib; CharP and CharZero classes. The embedding of Q or F_p into a field is available via algebraMap

mathlib_matches.name: Algebra.charZero_of_injective
mathlib_matches.notes: Related results about characteristic and prime subfields exist but the exact statement 'every field contains exactly one prime field' may need assembly

mathlib_matches.name: IsPrincipalIdealRing.ringKrullDim_eq_one
mathlib_matches.notes: In Mathlib.RingTheory.KrullDimension.PID; PIDs that are not fields have Krull dimension 1. Since Z is a PID and not a field, this gives ringKrullDim Z = 1

mathlib_matches.name: riemannZeta
mathlib_matches.notes: Mathlib.Analysis.SpecialFunctions.Integrals has some Riemann zeta results; the Euler product and basic properties are partially available but analytic continuation is complex

mathlib_matches.name: IsDiscreteValuationRing.TFAE
mathlib_matches.notes: In Mathlib.RingTheory.DiscreteValuationRing.TFAE; full TFAE proof of equivalent characterizations of DVRs

mathlib_matches.name: Algebra.IsIntegral.trans
mathlib_matches.notes: In Mathlib.RingTheory.IntegralClosure.IsIntegralClosure.Basic; transitivity of integrality fully proved
